intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: The government is putting mind control chips in our cereal, Vern!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: All of them! That's why I only eat raw oats now!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *laughing* Had you going for a second!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Birds aren't real, Vern! They're all government drones!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Yes! That's why they sit on power lines - recharging!

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Haha, come on, that was funny!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: The moon landing was fake, Vern. Filmed in a warehouse in Nevada.

development.speaker: Vern
development.text: That's been debunked thoroughly. Any new evidence?

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Well, no, but think about it - the flag was waving!

conclusion.speaker: Vern
conclusion.text: There's no wind in a vacuum. It was spring-loaded. Next caller.

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: Okay okay, I was just testing you. You passed!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: Vern, the Illuminati controls all the world's pizza chains.

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Think about it - triangular slices, all-seeing pepperoni...

conclusion.speaker: Caller
conclusion.text: *cracking up* Sorry, I couldn't keep a straight face!

intro.speaker: Caller
intro.text: VERN! The lizard people control EVERYTHING!

development.speaker: Caller
development.text: Watch any politician's eyes - they blink sideways sometimes!
